calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order and proposed consent judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
